Summary / Description: As a VIP patient I can request a dedicated concierge so I have one point of contact for appointments and services.
Acceptance Criteria: Dedicated concierge is assigned automatically on check-in or upon manual VIP request. Direct contact/chat option is visible on the VIP mobile widget.

Summary / Description: As a family guest I can request in-room services and transport so my relative's stay is seamless.
Acceptance Criteria: In-room service and transport request flows are accessible on the mobile widget. Real-time status/ETA updates are shown.

Summary / Description: Implement database models and migrations for ConciergeRequest and VIPProfile.
Acceptance Criteria: Tables created in database with indices on patient_id and status. PHI columns marked for encryption.

Summary / Description: Build backend REST API endpoints for concierge requests.
Acceptance Criteria: Create request and get status endpoints functional. Unit test coverage above 90%.

Summary / Description: Develop patient mobile widget UI for request tracking.
Acceptance Criteria: Responsive React components styled with luxury aesthetics. Real-time socket communication for status updates.

Summary / Description: Integrate concierge engine with EHR patient lookup and billing systems.
Acceptance Criteria: Retrieve active VIP tier from EHR. Successfully post concierge charges to billing service.

Summary / Description: Pilot concierge workflows with 5 VIP patients.
Acceptance Criteria: Collect initial feedback. Validate response time SLA (under 10 minutes) for patient requests.

Summary / Description: As a family I can reserve a VIP suite with specific amenities and chef service.
Acceptance Criteria: VIP room catalog shows pricing
Target Sprint / Week: and availability. Booking flow captures dietary/chef preferences and amenities.

Summary / Description: Develop room inventory database models and booking logic.
Acceptance Criteria: Room and Booking schemas created. Prevent double-booking race conditions during high occupancy.

Summary / Description: Integrate ICU pod monitoring with bedside device simulator.
Acceptance Criteria: Retrieve vitals data stream via WebSockets. Implement critical vitals alarm alerts to emergency notification bus.

Summary / Description: Link bookings with payment gateway and billing ledger.
Acceptance Criteria: Process deposits and generate comprehensive line-item bills for luxury amenities/chef services.

Summary / Description: Conduct mock patient admissions.
Acceptance Criteria: Train nursing and front desk staff on VIP admission checklist and privacy protocols.

Summary / Description: As a VIP patient I can schedule same-day imaging and receive prioritized results.
Acceptance Criteria: Direct access to same-day VIP radiology slots. Automatic result delivery via portal and SMS.

Summary / Description: Build LIS/PACS sample registration and priority flagging backend logic.
Acceptance Criteria: Integrate VIP sample database schema. Priority flag is propagated through all LIS processing queues automatically.

Summary / Description: Develop imaging scheduler with reserved VIP slot rules.
Acceptance Criteria: Scheduler limits general bookings in VIP-reserved slots. Allows concierge request to auto-book dedicated slots.

Summary / Description: Implement automatic report distribution system.
Acceptance Criteria: Generate PDF report. Push report to EHR patient portal and notify the patient via SMS/Email.

Summary / Description: Integrate with LIS and PACS simulators via FHIR/HL7.
Acceptance Criteria: Map FHIR DiagnosticReport and Observation resources. Send HL7 ORU messages to LIS simulator.

Summary / Description: As a VIP patient I can get pre-op clearance and concierge coordination within 48 hours.
Acceptance Criteria: Digital pre-op checklist status visible to patient in the portal. Automated reminders for missing clearance steps.

Summary / Description: Create robotic OR scheduler and scheduling rules engine.
Acceptance Criteria: Build priority allocation rules. Enforce 48-hour lead time warning for non-urgent procedures.

Summary / Description: Implement supply reservation and serial tracking.
Acceptance Criteria: Link OR bookings with inventory database. Lock implant serial number to specific booked surgery.

Summary / Description: Develop pre-op digital checklist and eConsent capture modules.
Acceptance Criteria: Mobile-friendly eConsent signoff for patients. Real-time checklist sync across clinical systems.

Summary / Description: Integrate with robotic surgical device telemetry and autoclave sterilization logs.
Acceptance Criteria: Store anonymized device usage logs. Log sterilization cycle run-id before releasing OR for scheduling.

Summary / Description: As a VIP patient I can request in-room medication delivery and receive counseling.
Acceptance Criteria: Request in-room delivery via app. Order tracking shows delivery stage. Schedule virtual/in-person pharmacist counseling.
